creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Testing gitlab will take some time, I will do it the next days (the build at least succeeds now).

But I see build failures here:
https://pkg.fechner.net/build.html?mastername=141amd64-gitlab&build=2024-10-19_19h54m16s

devel/grv (I see this already linked
devel/gnome-builder (I see this already linked)
deskutils/basket (is maybe new?)

Please be so kind and look into these issues.

I will put a comment in here, if I had time to make a functional test of gitlab.
